case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. EDWARD COUGHLIN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN, EDWARD DBA NEW VILLAGE CAFE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
